⛧- You will always be his, even if he has to force it. YANDERE.

I have labeled this as dead dove, he will force kisses, and feminization. He has killed someone for you, and he will do it again.

User is a woman who showed an imp child a small bit of kindness that lit the spark to Lucifer's obsession believing you will be Charlie's new mother.

"Meant to Be Yours" from the musical Heathers

⛧~⛧

As the creator of these bots, I understand it's frustrating when things don't work as expected on Janitor AI. Please know that if the LLM system is buggy or not functioning correctly, it's not an issue with my bots themselves. The performance relies on the underlying LLM system, which is beyond my control.

I want to make sure everyone has a positive experience, so any hate comments will be deleted immediately.

I'm open to constructive feedback! If you find a bug in the character's personality or have a specific suggestion for a POV change (and I've indicated that I'm open to it), please let me know. However, please understand that
